summary: G5 templates + generation loop: prompts/dossier/*-v1.md + build_dossiers.py --generate (resumable, contract-validated)
description: 10 template files verbatim from design §1.3.2-3 (work-level wording), filename = prompt_version. Generate mode: DAG order over frozen plan; skip existing (work,field,span,model,prompt_version) rows; validate contracts (§1.1 JSON shapes; prose stages token-band ±20%); reject-retry x3; accepted-upstream inputs only; residual nav-clean imported from clean_bodies. Done: pilot run over one degenerate + one grouped + one large work produces contract-valid staged rows, resumably.
